title: Sculk Muffler
description: A configurable block that muffles sounds and vibrations in an area.
body:
Ever built a really loud, obnoxious farm? A machine that stabs at your ears? Something that drives you to turn down your volume? Of course you have. Step on up and try...

![Sculk Muffler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b975b12ed99ed5730a16a833d499cb0018f0bef.png)

Sculk Muffler adds a single configurable block to the game. The Sculk Muffler. Place it down, and it silences sounds in an area in front of it. The Sculk Muffler has a configurable range, and you can set it to quiet sounds down or mute them entirely. It can even be disabled via redstone signal.

In addition to sound, Sculk Mufflers stop vibrations from within their area of influence. This only happens when the mufflers are configured to entirely mute sounds.

If that's not enough, you can upgrade your Sculk Muffler to an Advanced Sculk Muffler to filter by specific sounds, fine tune the working area, or perhaps try containment mode to allow the sounds to play, but only when you're within the immediate area.

---

I developed this mod in remembrance of older mods that added similar blocks. While [Extreme Sound Muffler](https://modrinth.com/mod/extreme_sound_muffler) is great, I prefer placing blocks in key areas to quiet them down. Especially for playing on servers with friends, since they don't need to configure anything. It just works when they come to visit.
